creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Vidar Karlsen from comment #1)

Thanks, I _do_ use lsusb. 

% pkg which /usr/local/sbin/lsusb
/usr/local/sbin/lsusb was installed by package usbutils-0.91
% pkg provides bin/lsusb
Name    : usbutils-0.91
Comment : Utility for listing USB devices
Repo    : FreeBSD-ports
Filename: usr/local/sbin/lsusb

Name    : toybox-0.8.11
Comment : All-in-one command line
Repo    : FreeBSD-ports
Filename: usr/local/toybox/usr/bin/lsusb
%
